name: Poker
description: Poker is the world's most-played gambling card family — Texas Hold'em, Omaha, Seven-Card Stud, Five-Card Draw, and a thousand house variants. Five-card hands rank from high card up through royal flush. The drama is in the betting: ante, raise, call, fold, bluff, read, and rake. A 52-card deck, a stack of chips, and infinite mind games.
